calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ARTHUR ZIVKOVIC's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
